project.description: Plugin project identifier on Hangar (e.g. BlueMap). The operator requires it when sourceType is hangar.

url.description: Direct download URL of the plugin JAR. The operator requires it when sourceType is url.

checksum.description: Optional SHA-256 checksum (64 hex characters) of the JAR file, used with sourceType url.

updateStrategy.description: Update strategy for the plugin version.

version.description: Target plugin version. The operator requires it for the pin and build-pin strategies.

instanceSelector.description: Selector for the servers this plugin is installed on. The label value to match is the Helm release name of the server app, `minecraft-server-<name>`.

matchLabels.description: Labels a PaperMCServer must carry to be selected. An empty selector matches every server in the namespace.

endpoints.description: Network endpoints exposed by this plugin.
